Name: face bond self-setting waterproof foundation
comments:
* This Face Bond is a close second to Stay Naked (discontinued).  Truly self-setting—the finish is beautiful, natural.  I had to use my brush to blend a little bit as a touch-up after about 4 hours.  Face Bond does not play well with my Make Up Forever or Ciaté primers, so consider using an Urban Decay primer.  I did not use any powder, and I do not like setting sprays (I only spray with cool water).   My skin still looked beautiful after walking in 80°F sunny weather and tearing up from laughter.  My Ami Colé concealer applied smoothly over it and I did not set that with powder either.  Stay Naked lasts better around the mouth and on textured areas.  Face Bond is a good follow-up to Stay Naked which is my favorite foundation (70NY).  I used shade 26 which is an even better color match.  I did not even need my color correcting primer that I normally use over my mineral sunscreens.  I recommend seeking help with the shade match and lighting.  This foundation will ultimately save money on additional products bc it color corrects, self-sets, and a small amount has big effect—it is like having multiple products in one.  Shake it first.  Solid product. * this is the worst foundation I've ever used and it wasn't even just that bottle. I had also purchased it in other shades. I literally after wearing this and wearing makeup for the past 20 years of my life wanted to give up onmake up after trying this, I literally would rather wear no makeup than wear this * This is a terrible foundation. My favorite foundation was the Urban Decay Naked foundation. I tried the "Stay Naked" when it was reformulated and it was a disaster on my face. This one is just as bad. Patchy. Have to use a ton of it to get coverage and it just wont cooperate. It also gets pilly throughout the day. * I would buy this product again and again! The Face Bond Self-Setting Waterproof Foundation is honestly one of the best foundations I've ever used. The coverage is excellent - it evens out my skin tone perfectly without feeling heavy or cakey. I love that it's self-setting, so I don't need to use extra powder, and it stays in place all day.
It feels lightweight on the skin, looks very natural, and really is waterproof. Even after a long day, my makeup still looks fresh and smooth.
If you're looking for a long-lasting, comfortable foundation with great coverage, I highly recommend this one! * I had loved how this foundation looked on skin. Very smooth and lasted all day easily. Minimizing my texture and pores. It sat so pretty. The reason why I have to remove a star and can't continue to use this makeup is due to burning skin reaction I got at work in the middle of the day. My skin literally started to itch and burn on the cheeks. I had to run to drugstore to buy makeup wipes. Please stop adding Niacinamide to foundation, Face Bond has 3% Niacinamide and most skincare has it too. Most makeup has it now when it sensitizes people's skin. Niacinamide is added in skincare and makeup is being advertised as skin care with over saturation of these active ingredients in everything now, it does not belong in foundation. Let customers decide their skincare routines. Also the fact this Face Bond has so much alcohol by day 3 of using this my skin literally screamed. But the makeup does look beautiful just the ingredients need to be better. Its half off i wonder if this is being phased out now. * With acne orobe skin, it is difficult to find a foundation. Howevr, face bibd has not caused any new breakouts. In fact, it is great with oil control, full coverage, and minimizing pores. It looks very natural without being cakey. The only warning is a hydrating lotion is needed uf uou have acne combo skin. * Color was way darker than the shade on the web, need a couple shades lighter but will consider purchasing again

I did a patch test and had a reaction to it. I was aware there was fragrance in it, however it was much more than anticipated. * Literally kicking myself for not trying skin glow sooner. Finish comparable to haus labs. Rivals the Dior skin perfect stick (my fav). Honestly puts Armani to shame. No cling to dry patches. Makes me want to cry how due to how pretty it is. lol * This foundation has a nice finish on my skin but it settles in every little line on my face, very disappointed. * 3rd time buying this. It blends perfectly, covers my fine lines, even my '11' line BUT BETTER THAN THAT- it covers my heavy rosacea on my cheeks. Love this product! * I love this product. It makes my face looks flawless and glowing,  I will recommend it to my friends * The foundation matches my skin tone perfectly. I was using another foundation before but found it very shear. This one covers but is not thick or caked on. It also has a nice scent to it. * The Dior Forever Foundation is absolutely amazing. It applies beautifully, evens out the skin tone, doesn't emphasize pores, and lasts all day without looking cakey. The skin looks fresh, smooth, and natural. It feels very comfortable on the skin and doesn't dry it out.
I'm very happy with the result — this is definitely a foundation I'll keep using and highly recommend.

Name: teint idole ultra wear 24h full coverage foundation
comments:
* I recently started trying this foundation out after the reformulation of EL Double Wear. I will say, I definitely don't hate it. It actually feels so great on my skin, it's super light but still provides coverage (I'm a full coverage girl), and lasts all day. I don't get the same amount of coverage as the previous DW formula, but it is buildable. I am worried I will go through it faster with having to use more. Overall though, I like it and will keep using this as an alternative and potentially as my new go-to foundation. * i noticed way too late and its too late to return now but i don't know if this is on the conpany or store itself… a bottle i bought recently for a better shade match is expiring way sooner than a bottle i bought a couple months back earlier and then i noticed there was a label on top of the original packaging expiration date and peeled it off and what do you know it expired last year?? its all so off but it explains why i hate the foundation so much now sadly, and im scared to buy another or confront the store cause they might think im crazy… * This foundation truly is full coverage! I do not need to wear foundation for 24hrs straight, but I have had some early days that lead into late nights. My foundation still looked beautiful 12-15 hours after application. My ride or die overall pick. * I have a lot of foundationa and several favorites (some of which have sadly been discontinued) at varying price points. This one has earned a spot on the list that would be repurchased. I tend to add a drop of hyaluronic acid to most formulas and did with this one as well. That might not be needed or wanted ny everyone but I love the finish it creates. 
One thing to keep in mind, not just at Ulta, learn how to read the manufacture/expiration dates on foundations. Brands have different codes but are available online snd it's important. The first bottle I ordered was for store pickup and I didn't realize that it was due to expire within 2 months and there's not a chance that I would use the entire bottle in that time, so I exchanged it. 
Foundations can be pricey, be sure to get your moneys worth. * This is no better. It's not techy, but it left my skin patchy dry and I broke out. * The color match was perfect and it was also great for mature skin. * This leaves such a beautiful finish, and last all day! My makeup stays put, even when I am sweating due to working in the heat outside! Outstanding foundation! Highly recommend!

Name: 4-in-1 love your selfie longwear foundation & concealer
comments:
* I've switched foundations a lot. Tarte is my go to and hands down my favorite I've ever used. I wish I wouldn't have tried something new. I should have went with what I know.... I've never really had an issue with creasing until buying this. It's great at first but after like an hour it gets in creases I didn't even know I had. 🤦🏻‍♀️ 
I will never purchase again. * Goes on smoothly and provides a very pretty finish. Love how buildable the product is. 
For me,  this foundation works best with other silicone based products. Personally, I find it doesn't last all day. But still a nice product. * After trying what feels like every foundation ever made I finally found PUR and I haven't looked back. The coverage is amazing and the finished look is so smooth and clean. I did read a few reviews talking about the finish and how it can leave your skin "textured", what I would recommend is to ensure you are using a good moisturizer and a well formulated primer that is compatible with the foundation. All primers do not work with all foundations formula wise and can therefore cause separation of the product. 😊 * I first got color matched in store with this brand in 2021 and after not being able to find it for a while thought it to be discontinued but im so happy its not! This is the best, checks all my boxes - great color match, redness control, extremely buildable, and does not break me out. 5 stars all the way!! * I've been using the 4-in-1 Love Your Selfie Longwear Foundation & Concealer for 4 years now, and honestly… nothing compares. I have normal/oily skin with most of my oil in the T-zone, and this foundation covers everything without feeling heavy or cakey.

Pro tip: prep is everything. Cleanse, moisturize, use a good primer, apply your foundation, then lock it in with a setting spray. When trying a new foundation, minor breakouts for the first couple of weeks can be normal, but if it keeps happening… it's probably not your match.

One bottle lasts me about 4–5 months, and I use it 2–5 times a week.
If you want longwear, full coverage, and real skin confidence, this is it. * absolutely  great color match.  Great texture and natural looking coverage * It leaves the skin with a terrible texture.

comments: * For years I swore by Estée Lauder Double Wear but I'll tell you that even though I am a creature of habit I have changed my way of thinking this is the absolute best makeup with the best coverage. The shade is perfect, the matte finish makes my skin look like it was poured on, oil control lasts throughout the day. * Tarte is by far my favorite make up brand but this was a miss for me. This foundation has great coverage and a beautiful finish but not for long After only a couple of hours this makes my face soooo oily and the foundation breaks up so badly and looks truly awful It transfers badly too amd if upu touch your face it disappears I have tried multiple application methods different primers, setting powders and sprays and nothing can keep this from becoming a greasy disaster and I have pretty dry skin too * For the reviews saying it's "too oily, slides right off": HEY, if you use a primer, or a setting spray, or setting powder, with this product, it will last you 24 hours easy. Even in heat, at gym, sleeping, etc. I get 36hrs+ out of this no problem, & I'm just using a light setting spray over it, & a little setting powder in my t-zone (cuz I'm on the oily side.) & I have zero problems with this foundation in that respect. But yes, if you wear this ALONE, without any primer, setting spray, or setting powder, don't expect it to last all day & night long. Because it is super creamy, & hydrating, it's not going to be a matte oil absorbing foundation. Which is not what you want after 40yo anyway!! But it's not toooo much (like Estee Lauder's Futurist Hydra, for example - now there's an oil slick that never dries & falls right off, lol.) This foundation has been my life saver - one of the few that doesn't ruin my skin with acne, & is full coverage +++. It has a flawless finish, like a satin natural, not too radiant, but definitely not matte.  It is FAR from being dry or cakey, & it does NOT crease. What a blessing this lil gem is. I will buy this as long as Tarte continues to make it. My ride or die foundation!!

Name: veil hydrating skin tint
comments:
* I have tried so many foundations and skin tints and never find one I like as much as Hourglass Veil. Just the GOAT of skin tints! * I'm obsessed and will buy again. It's pretty light coverage, leaves my skin dewy. I mix one drop of bronze drops with it and set it with a powder. It makes my skin look so healthy! My sister will be buying as well. * Bought this on suggestion of sales lady in Ulta. Used it and could not even tell where I put it on. It is very moisturizing but I want/need a little coverage to even out my skin tone. Product was not for me. I returned it for refund. * Leaves my skin feeling extremely greasy and sticky. I will not ever be buying this again… I've tried using it alone and with my regular primer and moisturizer and no matter how I use it I feel greasy and it rubs off onto EVERYTHING. You would think in the dry West Texas weather where everyones skin dries out with everything it would be great hut ko it just gets more greasy feeling as the day goes on * I'm 37, and have given up on foundation, it just makes me look older than I am. I've been on the hunt for the perfect skin tint (Ilia, Live Tinted, drug store etc.), but this is a 10/10. I have normal to dry skin, and fine lines/large pores. This makes my skin look amazing. Truly your skin, but better. Even at 10x magnification you can't see this on the skin. I set it with a little powder and it lasts 8+ hours without settling into my fines lines. It's very easy to apply, I just blend it out with my fingers. I even use this under my eyes instead of concealer. The coverage of this is sheer to light. It's perfect for the no-makeup look, my skin looks naturally beautiful with this. This is never heavy or cakey, it really just feels like a moisturizer. This is a keeper! * Love it * AMAZING wonderful, beautiful, flattering, best ever for dry skin! I don't understand the negative reviews. 

Product looks extremely pigmented when squeezed out of the tube: I get good medium coverage on my face, like a true makeup foundation, not at all like a tinted moisturizer, nor like a BB cream (maybe after 8 hours it has faded a bit -- an extremely EVEN, flattering fade, I might add -- to perhaps light-medium coverage around the 7th to 9th hour...?). 

So: my facial skin is aged, so dry it comes off in flakes, it has several deep lines & lots of medium-deep wrinkles, lots of medium & fine lines, can get clogged pores, have some visible pores on my nose, very dark circles, uneven color everywhere and darker color patches on chin, occasional red blemish. Every single makeup except this causes to my dryness to worsen, skin cracking, just so bad I had given up on wearing makeup (except when very needed, only a few hours). The one product I use sometimes is Hourglass "Vanish" (a stick foundation), but it is heavy & needed lots of moisturizing primer; it was visually a great color match but still I'd get some caking and dry patches late in the day with Vanish stick product. So I went to Ulta with my Vanish stick foundation (they don't sell it at Ulta) and the associate found a corresponding Moisture Veil color and sent me home with a sample. I stupidly let it sit on the counter for 6 weeks (wish I had started using it earlier!!); prior to a recent event, I tried it out. 

Oh My Gosh!! Moisture Veil is AMAZING. So pigmented. Beautiful looking on my face. Applied easily, blended out so nicely (just with my fingers). I had forgotten primer & it was not problem: very even application. My skin felt extremely comforted, nourished, very moisturized all day long. Product did not at initial application settle in my wrinkles, and, I am shocked, did not do settle into my lines all day long even at the 8th, 9th, 10th hour of wear. 

No clinging to dry patches (in fact, my dry patches kind of disappeared with Moisture Veil), no cracking, no cakey-ness whatsoever. I looked about 10, maybe 15 years younger, and also like I'd had a really good night's sleep. 

I did dab on top of the product a very small amount of my Hourglass Vanish stick foundation (it can also be used as a concealer) under my eyes and on one small blemish-caused discoloration (so I wasn't concerned if the Veil did not cover my dark circles). The Vanish "played nice" with Moisture Veil (which was surprising, because usually Vanish needs a really slippery primer to blend: but it blended easily with the Moisture Veil under it). So now I wear Moisture Veil daily. 

The Moisture Veil has a very nice finish: it is not shiny at all, yet not super flat/matte. It has no shimmer at all (shimmer/glitter/"glow" imo is a problem for really aged, wrinkly skin like mine). The finish is very natural, healthy, very pretty, like real skin that has always been "you have such good skin." 

It does a great job evening out my skin tone / discoloration. It makes my pores disappear except for a small area area with bigger pores (and those pores look much, much smaller and far less noticeable with Veil). I have not noticed transferring (but I am not rubbing my face on things during the day, so idk) and it definitely stays in place on my face and does not at all slide around. 

I am not using primer and not using setting powder, but it lasts fine for 6 - 7 hours no fading, medium coverage; then another 3 - 6 hours hours (hours 8-12) it is still there but has faded to lighter coverage but color remains true to what it should be and it is still very even coverage, and still not dry patches. This is very good longevity for me!  

Improved skin health: since I have been wearing it daily my skin's extreme dryness has been healing, even at night when I'm not wearing Veil, it's like I have different skin. My skin tone also seems to have become more even (when I am not even wearing Veil) since I started using it. I also have not broken out nor gotten any increase in my mild clogged pores situation since I began wearing Veil every day. 

I hope that Hourglass keeps making Moisture Veil forever! I love this foundation so much!! If you have very dry skin, try it out!

HIGHLY recommend * I am not typically a cream foundation girl, but as I've gotten older, I'm trying different things. A little goes a long way and for me it gives me the coverage I need. Name: always on skin-balancing foundation with hyaluronic acid + adaptogens
comments:
* I don't normally leave reviews, but this foundation is so good that I had to share my experience. I truly never thought I'd find anything that could replace it, but Smashbox Always On actually wins, even over MAC Pro Longwear.

I'm in my forties with combination skin, large pores, fine lines, wrinkles, and some age spots, so I'm very particular about foundation. I look for something long-wearing that doesn't require constant reapplication, provides strong coverage without looking heavy or cakey, and minimizes the appearance of pores.

This foundation exceeded my expectations. It covered my age spots beautifully without needing layers or concealer, yet still looked natural and skin-like. My complexion looked smooth and flawless, not thick or cakey. It blurred my pores, didn't settle into fine lines or wrinkles, and gave my skin a soft-focus, blurred effect,  and a natural finish.

The wear time is excellent. It stayed put all day and still looked great at the end of the day, without breaking down.

It is a bit pricey, but it is of great quality. I'm officially a huge fan and will definitely be buying this as my everday foundation. Great for looking put together on minimal makeup days. * The coverage of this bad boy is wat too light to be called a foundation, but it doesnt have any skin care benefits which is I guess why they can't call it BB cream. Girl Tinted Foundation in my local Ulta's clearance section and figured I'd give it a try. Warm Sand perfectly matches my skin right now during the winter. I'll try Tawny again in the spring/summer, but it was a close match too. It looks just slightly dewy but doesn't feel overly wet or sticky. It also works well under my bareMinerals BAREPRO 16HR Skin-Perfecting Powder Foundation if I want to look more made up, but between the price and its natural look when used solo, it fits well with my minimalist approach to makeup. * I am 66 years old. Name: skin by mented foundation
comments:
* I saw mented today and bought m10, d10, t30(like 2 of each) I did this with complexion changes and such in mind. It was so easy to apply, felt nice on my skin, looks natural and I think m10 is my shade - it is spot on (for my beautiful summer complexion ) I'm excited to have found Mented! not a con for me, because i don't choose a makeup to smell good, but definitely seems like fragrance wasn't added.

I have pretty dry sky so I know to add a moisturizer before applying this. So excited to have finally found a shade so spot on with my skin tone that it's almost scary. The stick foundation is easy to apply, blends well and leaves me a great natural glow. * Looked awful on me. Horrible on oily skin and def dont get if you have light skin. This foundation isnt made for light skin tones which sucks. * Perfect match almost feels like a tinted moisturizer. I'm oily so I still need a powder but for stick makeup it goes on smooth and doesn't run off. I'm sold * Okay so hear me out.. the color match to my skin is amazing!!! it blended beautifully. However, I have combo oily skin and nothing could have prepared me for how shiny and oily this foundation is. This is not a matte foundation so beware!! * Hidden Gem hands down. I have been looking for a good foundation in general for a few years now, I went high end low end drugstore I went tinted moisturizer to full coverage and non did what I actually wanted. I love make up but finding a good foundation for my oily skin that wont force me to re touch (which I'm horrible at by the way, always makes it worse) was close to impossible without making me feel like I have pounds of make up on especially for work. I had tried the Hourglass foundation stick which was highly rated and felt very chalky on my skin. I did a search of stick foundations and came across this one. I am the lightest shade in this line and am on my way to re up for a 3rd time! I have never purchased 1 item more than once since they end up not working out for a while. The coverage is amazing from one layer to a 2 layers if I want a fuller look. It glides on like butter on my skin  and gives me a glow without an oily look if that makes sense. I rarely have to completely set my face because it sets so nice on its own and will literally last me over 9 hours without any cracks or separation and looks like I just applied it minutes ago. It makes my face feel hydrated and not like I'm wearing loads of make up. This is a long review and I never leave a review but I am truly in love with this foundation! I am so thankful for this brand because I am the in between when it comes to make up, I'm a semy fare complexion with neutral undertones. Many lines have a Yellow undertone or an olive undertone which makes me look washed out. This is truly a bang for your buck and will leave your make up looking flawless.

Name: all nighter liquid full coverage foundation
studio radiance face and body radiant sheer foundation
comments: * wow. I can go on about this foundation forever. I have very pale, dry skin, this shade range cancels out any issues ive had with light foundations that are too orange, does not stick to or emphasize when i have dryness. I 100% recommend this product. * This doesn't settle in wrinkles like a lot of foundation.  It is a bit hard to use to start with but once you figure it out it's very nice.  Good for older and younger skin.  I'm 64 and it's the best I've ever used. * This foundation is perfect for evening out skin tone without making it look like you painted your make up on. I really love pairing it with cream contour and cream blush, and then just setting it with a setting spray- it gives a gorgeous dewy finish. You can set it with powder to make it a little more long lasting too. I always try to catch it on sale. I think having a gorgeous light coverage foundation like this is perfect for an interview, meeting someone new, or embracing your natural beauty! Its made me feel so much more confident in my own skin. * The origin to my villain story. I listened to an ULTA employee, first foundation for my high school homecoming. Three days later I broke out, having clear skin all my life. Ever since, it never stopped. I had to go on meds to cure my acne. Don't use. * I used to use the old face and body without the radiance and always loved it so im not surprised I love the new version especially because I like more of a sheen/glow to my skin. This is a very sheer coverage foundation but is buildable if you want a little more coverage. Also I can apply this over my skincare without it pilling! * I never tried the original face and body. Honestly, I was never interested in this foundation until I started watching Miss Megan Robinson on tik tok. Seriously you NEED to follow her!! I generally have oily skin. It's been a lot more calm, and a lot less oily after I got rid of all the actives, and JUST started washing, toning, and using AN OIL (I know right, but it's true, oil loves oil, using an oil will keep your skin from producing a lot of oil) I can now wear this foundation confidently, and it is BEAUTIFUL!! It's friction activated so I suggest applying with fingers and rubbing it in so you can start to feel the "gripping and thickening" action that happens with this foundation(which is the best most fun part for me). Coming from an oily girl that is shocking. If you're wondering, I use the Danessa Myricks yummy skin balm in translucent as a primer, this foundation, all my other creams and liquids, and I set with Mac studio fix powder and one size setting spray. PERFECTED NATURAL RADIANT SKIN * Wear it everyday and have received unprovoked complements.

Name: perfect lasting foundation
comments:

Idk what is in this foundation but  I want to buy every bottle just incase it ever gets discontinued😅😭😭😭 * My relationship with foundation is a nightmare,I'm a brown skin girl with golden undertones in the summer and pale skin in the winter,without much prep this foundation matched me perfectly and stayed on ALL NIGHT,the a night of dancing 💕LOVE THIS STUFF * Please restock ASAP!  FYI- you can still find VDL on Yesstyle BUT it's NOT the same foundation. The one on Yesstyle has SPF & it has more of a dewy finish 😩 * I hope Ulta is not going to stop selling this foundation. It is an amazing satin finish foundation. Looks flawless on the skin and makes blemished skin look smooth. Wears beautifully throughout the day and is full coverage. Highly recommend. FYI if they stop selling it at Ulta you can find it on YesStyle. * I bought this foundation in the color A06. I tend to have a hard time finding foundations because I am in the weird shade range where I'm typically between medium/tan and dark/deep in various brands. I have Neutral slightly golden/olive undertones and find that many brands get close but not perfectly my shade. Most times foundations are too golden (almost orange looking), too cool, exactly neutral when I need just a touch of yellow in the foundation, or they just skip my shade altogether. I was pleasantly surprised when this foundation was an exact match. I love the natural finish to this foundation. I have dehydrated combo skin that if not properly hydrated will get oily in the t-zone (mostly nose area) and will remain normal or slightly dry everywhere else. When I wear this for several hours my foundation goes from very natural to radiant but not oily as my t-zone starts to break into a bit of a shine. I really don't have anything bad to say about this foundation except because of the limited shade range there's a chance you may not find a good match depending on your skin tone and undertone. Hopefully Ulta continues to keep this foundation available. * I would describe this foundation on my skin as full coverage with a satin/slight dewy finish. Would recommend for various skin types.

Not powdery, didn't settle in lines, let's your skin peek through (is light coverage).   I really love it. * I thought since it's called age perfect it would be a moisturizing creamy powder. Nope. This finishing powder is a game changer - so easy to apply and bonus, the packaging is so adorable! But more importantly my skin looks so velvety and super plump, definitely will be coming back for more when I'm through with this! * Love using this powder in-between zoom meetings to touch up my skin. Do not use with a brush, the powder is finely milled and will fall off your brush! I wore it over serum and moisturizer. Name: vanish seamless finish liquid foundation
comments:
* For a pro makeup artist, ( yes, you need to be a pro to know how to work with it) this is so far one of the best foundations that I have ever worked with. I recommend performing a gentle face exfolation before bed time and removing any peach fuzz for any makeup aplication, not just this foundation. It makes a huge difference in aplication and appearance of the final look/finish.
It works best with the Vanish smoothing primer. (To smooth down the pores that every human being has) It is runny but extreamly pigmented. Do not use too much or it will look cakey.Best apply with a dense buffer brush (Morphe 444 is my favorite) and then press it in with a beauty blender. I use the professional Kryolan setting spray first, and then set it with a good powder.( Jeffree Star, Fenty or Kryolan powder) It holds for 14h even in humid Florida. Best foundation for events. It's best for normal/ combination skin. I wish they had more shades.
Unfortunately it just has been discontinued, tho the company has gave me insites that they are working on perfecting the formula and making a new foundation for combination/oily skin (they currently carry luminous foundations for normal/dry skin) * It's runny and oily the color that matches to your so called already color foundation your wearing is 19x darker * It's runny and oily the color that matches to your so called already color foundation your wearing is 19x darker * This product is so thin & runny! Like water consistency. I pumped one pump on my hand & it literally dripped off me. I shook the bottle so many times & it still remained runny. I gave it a try on my face because I wanted to give the foundation a chance but the product just settled right into any crevice it could. I could literally see wrinkles/lines I didn't even know I had. * I got this during a sale and was so excited to try my first Hourglass product. I followed the instructions and reviews and only used a very little amount. It brings out my pores horribly, dries down very weird and makes my skin dry, and even though it feels light on my skin my skin feels a tiny bit sticky, not something I usually experience with prestige brand foundations. This is a miss for me. * This foundation is very reminiscent of Marc Jacob's 'Remarcable' . Full coverage and matte with a pore filling matte primer underneath . comments: * Luckily I night this on a good sale a ways back but it is just not it.
